response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure, and has limited experience in senior technical leadership roles.
strengths: Experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Strong background in software development and testing
Proven ability to work on complex projects
concerns: No direct experience with agentic AI or fintech infrastructure
Limited experience in senior technical leadership at scale-ups
Lack of specific experience with required technologies like LangGraph or real-time inference systems
